loop1.title: Events KPI Strip
loop1.note: Showing sag/swell/current/neutral event counts and worst deviation/imbalance from member meters; some members (UPS-05, UPS-06) are dark and will render blank.

loop1.title: AI Summary
loop1.note: Showing AI narrative summaries for 8 primary feeders; 2 feeders (UPS-05, UPS-06) are dark (no data) and will render as honest blanks.

loop1.title: Event Timeline at {period}
loop1.note: Showing event trends for 7 active feeders; 2 feeders (GIC-02-N6-UPS-05, GIC-02-N7-UPS-06) are dark (no data) and render as honest blanks.

loop1.title: Current Distribution at {period}
loop1.note: Showing current_avg per outgoing feeder; sag/swell/voltage metrics are not measured by this panel's aggregate table and are honest-blanked.

loop1.title: Other Panels Event at {period}
loop1.note: Showing per-panel event profile and voltage/current metrics for the selected period; some members (Solar Incomers, UPS-05/06) are dark (no data) and will render as blanks.
